title: Velvety Turkish Tofu Kebabs
description: A plant-based Turkish dish featuring crispy tofu, meringue nests, and a malty cheese-pull, perfect for midnight cravings. This recipe is robata-grill friendly and serves as a satisfying snack.
instructions: Preheat the robata grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a bowl, mix together paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the tofu cubes to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the spice mixture.
Brush the robata grill with oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the tofu cubes for 5 minutes per side, or until golden brown.
Meanwhile, toast the meringue nests by baking them in the oven at 300 degrees Fahrenheit for 5 minutes.
Assemble the kebabs by placing a grilled tofu cube on each meringue nest.
Drizzle the malty cheese sauce over the tofu and serve immediately.
